meaning: n.小精灵,矮人,淘气鬼,恶作剧的人,恶人
examples: Finally, the last day of school arrived and the elf was free to go.
As the perfect man and the perfect woman were driving with the elf, somehow they got into an accident.
The Alibaba group's founder and leader is the sharp-featured Jack Ma. Reporters cannot resist likening him to a pixie or an elf.
Santa Santa said, oh, little elf, little elf, come, sing "Away in a Manger" for us.
Mr. SEDARIS: (As Crumpet the Elf) This evening, I was sent to be a photo elf.
